root.rep_text: รายงานรายการวัสดุของสหกรณ์ที่ถูกแก้ไข
root.sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc_acc_m_expire_edit.material_id , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.sequence_no , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.description , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.rate_expire , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.edit_id , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.edit_date , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.description_new , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.rate_expire_new , sc_acc_m_expire_edit.type_expire , sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old, case sc_acc_m_expire_edit.type_expire when 'UPDATE_EDT' then 'แก้ไข' else 'ลบ' end as type_expire1, sc_acc_m_expire.ending_of_account_cal FROM sc_acc_m_expire_edit, sc_acc_m_expire WHERE (sc_acc_m_expire.material_id = sc_acc_m_expire_edit.material_id) /*and ( sc_acc_m_expire_edit.edit_id between :adtm_begindate and :adtm_enddate )*/ and ( sc_acc_m_expire_edit.type_expire = 'UPDATE_EDT' ) or ( sc_acc_m_expire_edit.type_expire = 'UPDATE_DEL' ) /*WHERE*/ order by sc_acc_m_expire.doc_old
